ljdkj lkj.kh&1 esa mfYyf[kr chvksVh ¼Vksy ifj;kstukvksa½ dh vf/klwpukvksa esa ,rn~}kjk fuEufyf[kr la'kks/ku djrh gS% ^^'kqYd fudVre #i, ds LFkku ij #i, 5@& ds xq.kkad esa laxzghr rFkk iw.kkZafdr fd;k tk,xk^^A lkj.kh&1 Ø- la- 'kqYd vf/klwpuk ds C;kSjs jktekxZ [k.M dk uke dk- vk- la[;k rkjh[k 1 2712 ¼v½ 1848 ¼v½ 21-11-2008 28-07-2009 vEckyk&paMhx<+ 2 3288 ¼v½ 24-12-2009 flYd ckWMZj taD'ku&gkslwj 3 842 ¼v½ 27-04-2011 uhyeaxyk taD'ku&nsohgYyh 4 1849 ¼v½ 08-08-2011 caxykSj&gksLdksV&eqycxy 5 760 ¼v½ 3320 ¼v½ 18-03-2009 30-12-2014 fot;okM+k&fpYdkSjhisV [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@lhvks@2016&17] nf{krk nkl] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th January, 2017 S.O. 167(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the use of section of National Highways/Permanent Bridge/Temporary Bridge on National Highways) Rules, 1997, the Central Government authorized the Concessionaires of following BOT (Toll) Projects mentioned in Table-1 for levy and collection of user fee wherein the fee shall be rounded off to nearest rupee. Now, considering problem of change/shortage of coins and inconvenience to the users due to delays at Fee Plazas in transactions on account of change, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notifications of BOT (Toll) Projects mentioned in Table-1: “The fee shall be rounded off and levied in multiple of the nearest Rs.5/- instead of nearest rupee.” TABLE-1 Sl. No. Details of Fee Notification Name of Highway Section S.O. No. Date 1 2712 (E) 1848 (E) 21.11.2008 28.07.2009 Ambala-Chandigarh 2 3288(E) 24.12.2009 Silk Border Junction – Hosur 3 842(E) 27.04.2011 Neelamangla Junction – Devihalli 4 1849(E) 08.08.2011 Bangalore-Hoskote-Mulbagal 5 760(E) 3320(E) 18.03.2009 30.12.2014 Vijaywada-Chilkauripet [F. No. NHAI/13013/CO/2016-17] DAKSHITA DAS, Jt. Secy.
